title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
